title: penstemon scariosus
intro: Penstemon scariosus, also known as Rocky Mountain penstemon, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help treat various health issues. Its medicinal properties can also be beneficial for respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds, and can aid in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Penstemon scariosus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its health benefits.
